tasks.title: Fix input validation in auth handler
tasks.prompt: The login endpoint at /api/auth/login does not validate email format before querying the database. Add email format validation using the existing validator package. Return 400 with a clear error message for invalid emails. Add unit tests for the validation logic.

tasks.title: Add rate limiting to public API endpoints
tasks.prompt: Add rate limiting middleware to all /api/public/ endpoints. Use the token bucket algorithm with a limit of 100 requests per minute per IP. Return 429 with Retry-After header when exceeded. Add integration tests.

tasks.title: Update API documentation for auth changes
tasks.prompt: Update the API documentation in README.md to reflect the new email validation on the login endpoint and the rate limiting on public endpoints. Include example requests and error responses.
